name_en: 🆕 [Top-tier Original] M11706 Suit Wallet 👏👏 Made of Pharrell Williams Monogram Dust canvas from the 2024 Autumn/Winter 'From Paris to Virginia' show, featuring a vintage Monogram pattern and a Marque L.vuitton Déposé logo on the front. Includes card slots, an inner compartment, and a zippered coin pocket. Dimensions: 10x19x2
